name: Submission Validation Error Resolution
description:
The facility report 'Apex Industrial Coatings' has mandatory data validation errors preventing final submission. Open EPA Tier2 Submit and open the baseline file located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\apex_draft.t2s. Run the validation check or manually navigate to resolve these 3 specific errors: 

1. In Contacts, locate Sarah Jenkins and add her 24-Hour Phone: 800-555-9922.
2. In Chemical Inventory for Toluene (CAS 108-88-3), check the missing physical/health hazards: Flammable (gases, aerosols, liquids, or solids), Skin Corrosion or Irritation, Reproductive toxicity, and Specific target organ toxicity (single or repeated exposure).
3. In Storage Locations for Toluene, edit 'Solvent Tank 4' and set both Pressure and Temperature to 'Ambient'.

Once all three validation errors are resolved, save the corrected file to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\apex_corrected.t2s.
